calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-24-2024 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Eric Nagy Plaintiff/Respondent in Pro Per
Anton Kalafati Defendant/Appellant in Pro Per

All parties are sworn.

Anton Kalafati Defendant/Appellant testifies on his own behalf.
Mr. Kalafati presents the following exhibits:

Exh. 1: Itemized list of damages re: deposit
Exh. 2: Repair invoices

Eric Nagy Plaintiff/Respondent testifies on his own behalf.

The Court asks clarifying questions.

Mr. Nagy Plaintiff/Respondent testifies further on his own behalf.
Mr. Kalafati Defendant/Appellant testifies further on his own behalf.

The Court retains the exhibits.
The Court takes this matter under submission and will issue a decision via USPS mail.

Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: K. Septien, Not reported, (504).

Off Calendar Apr-24-2024 Set For Trial On Apr-24-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 504
